global_summary: Company is behind: 29 of 174 tasks done, tracking 32% of the plan. Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack carry the heaviest slips and need urgent attention. Most other sites stay savable if crews hit their weekend deadlines.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Slip: 95%; 1 of 21 expected work-days done, only the fireplace and doors fix complete. Next: install appliances by Wed Jul 8.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip: 64%; 4 of 13 expected work-days done, secret door built but brick stalled on cashflow. Next: brick installation by Sat Jul 11.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 12% of the month plan (15.0 of 23.0 expected work-days done; 3/29 tasks). To recover: finish KITCHEN : PLUMBING TRIM by Sat Jul 11.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slip: 15%; 11 of 16 expected work-days done, foundation dug and in-ground plumbing complete. Next: in-ground electrical by Fri Jul 10.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Slip: 23%; 10 of 21 expected work-days done, no tasks closed this week. Next: interior primer and tile install by Sat Jul 11.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 21%; 26 of 37 expected work-days done, interior paint and doors complete. Next: cabinet paint by Fri Jul 10.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 14% of the month plan (52.0 of 66.0 expected work-days done; 6/23 tasks). To recover: finish PLUMBING ROUGH IN: EXECUTE by Fri Jul 10.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Slip: 5%; 13 of 16 expected work-days done, exterior sheathing complete. Next: roof decking by Sat Jul 11.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Slip: 5%; 9 of 11 expected work-days done, sheetrock hung and plumbing inspection passed. Next: drywall tape and texture by Thu Jul 16.
